untranslatable_reason: Frying Pan pattern requires identification of specific geometric formation structure (downsloping handle at 0-45 degrees, measured lead-in height, widest vertical distance in first quarter, and leveling pan base). These spatial/geometric relationships cannot be expressed with the available point-in-time indicators. The conversion above approximates entry via oversold conditions and momentum reversal, but the true pattern definition involves multi-bar trend line analysis and relative position mapping that exceeds indicator-based logic.
